text: Here in this modern, sterile space, surrounded by glass and screens and bold colors, I feel slightly unmoored. The clean lines invite contemplation, but the bright lights and angled views stir a sense of curiosity and alertness. I am both participant and observer, pondering the promises and anxieties of research and development—innovation as both comfort and disruption. The environment is unfamiliar, evoking a faint anticipation as if on the edge of discovery, yet I remain aware of my own smallness within these vast designs.
